description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and a mix of wood and white exterior finishes. The front facade includes a spacious balcony with a glass railing above a covered carport, where a car is parked on a concrete driveway. The ground floor has expansive sliding glass doors opening onto a wide terrace, while the upper floor is divided into several rooms with large windows for natural light. The side and rear elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a clean, geometric appearance. The house is set on a rectangular plot with a paved area extending from the front. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and strong horizontal lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, wood accents, and a covered carport with a driveway. The design is minimalist and geometric, with open balconies and spacious terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large balcony with glass railing, wood paneling, and the carport with a car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid white wall with a single window and the depth of the balcony and terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid wall with a few windows and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wood accent wall, the edge of the balcony, and the driveway extending from the carport.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under a covered carport, featuring a large glass door and minimalistic design with no steps or decorative columns.
